notes: Production runtime intentionally remains CC7.5.25 legacy layered loader.
AdminKit Core is still side-by-side and not active globally in production webhook routing.
Core channels.home now uses a read-only data adapter and displays real channels from ak_admin_channels joined with ak_channels and ak_posts counts.
The channels data adapter is SELECT-only and does not create, update, delete, or select a channel.
The Connect channel action in Core is informational only; legacy connection flow remains untouched.
Batched access render and ack cleanup remain active.
/debug/core-timings remains available for comparing renderMs and deliveryMs.
Next migration step: redeploy, verify channelsReadOnlyDataReady=true, open Core Каналы and confirm channel title/post counts appear.
